title: Workbook Protection on sheet names.
author: sushilresilinc
body: How to protect workbook. I want to use workbook protection to stop user from adding or changing sheet names from below add sheet sign. I am using angular 7+ to create excel file.

comments.author: Isra1997
comments.body: Hi, @sushilresilinc  have you found a solution or a workaround?
